notes: Tiny 3-declaration file proving the algebraic-Liouville inequality at finite places (Silverman II.1) and its contrapositive. `pointValuation_algebraMap_F_le_one` is the project's canonical scalar-tower bridge for constants entering valuation rings, used heavily across SamePlace, TranslateLocalRing, TranslateValuation, TranslationOrd, and other files. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides.
